title: Šibenik Airport Transfers | Fixed Prices | TAXI Antonio
description: Šibenik airport transfers to and from Split, Zadar, Zagreb and Dubrovnik airports. Fixed prices, flight monitoring, door to door. Also serving Vodice, Primošten & Skradin. Book with Antonio.
keywords: sibenik airport transfers, šibenik airport transfer, split airport to sibenik, zadar airport to sibenik, vodice airport transfer

mainEntity.name: How do I find my driver at the airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: Antonio waits in the arrivals hall after baggage claim, holding a clear sign with your name.

mainEntity.name: What if my flight is delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Flights are monitored in real time using the flight number you provide at booking. The pickup time is adjusted automatically and there is no extra charge for waiting.

mainEntity.name: Is the airport transfer price fixed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Every airport transfer is a fixed price per car for up to 4 passengers, with tolls, fuel and luggage included. No meter, no surprises.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide child seats for airport transfers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, child and booster seats are provided free of charge. Just request them in the booking notes with the child's age.

mainEntity.name: How do I pay for an airport transfer?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 20% advance payment (minimum 20 euros) confirms the booking, by bank transfer or card. The balance is paid to the driver on the day, in cash or by card.
